transcript: Speaker A (AI): Do you like tea? Speaker B (Human): Yes, I like. Speaker A (AI): Yes, I like nahi. Yes, I do hoga. Agar question do se shuru hota hai to answer mein bhi do hoga. [Not 'Yes, I like'. It will be 'Yes, I do'. If the question starts with 'do', the answer will also have 'do'.] Speaker B (Human): Okay, okay. Speaker A (AI): Do you study English? Speaker B (Human): No, I do. Speaker A (AI): No, I do nahi. No, I don't hoga. [Not 'No, I do'. It will be 'No, I don't'.] Speaker B (Human): Achha, aisa hai kya? Main English kaise seekhun? [Oh, is that so? How do I learn English?] Speaker A (AI): Mere saath roz sirf 15 minutes practice karo, ek mahine mein hi English seekh jaoge. [Practice with me for just 15 minutes daily, you will learn English in just one month.] Speaker B (Human): Par ye to kaafi mehenga hoga na? [But this must be quite expensive, right?] Speaker A (AI): Bilkul nahi. Sirf ek rupee mein poori app try kar sakte ho. 1 crore se zyada log mere saath English seekh rahe hain. [Not at all. You can try the whole app for just one rupee. More than 1 crore people are learning English with me.] Speaker B (Human): Wow, phir join kaise karun? [Wow, then how do I join?] Speaker A (AI): Abhi MySivi app download karo aur English seekhna shuru kar do. [Download the MySivi app now and start learning English.]
on_screen_text: DO YOU; YES, I LIKE; YES, I DO; AGAR QUESTION; DO SE SHURU; DO YOU STUDY; NO, I DO; NO, I DON'T; AISHA HAI KYA; ENGLISH KAISE; MERE SAATH; 15 MINS; EK MAHINE; MEHENGA; BILKUL NAHI; MySivi Premium; LIMITED TIME OFFER; 3 days of Premium benefits for ‑1; SIRF EK; 1,200 learners purchased today; 24/7 AI English Teacher; 500+ Exercises and Lessons; Unlimited Access; ONE CRORE; Start English Learning - MySivi; 10M+ Downloads; WOH, PHIR; MySivi AI English Speaking...; ABHI MYSIVI; DOWNLOAD; AUR ENGLISH
summary: An AI avatar corrects a man's English grammar errors in a split-screen format. The AI then promotes the MySivi app, highlighting a 3-day premium trial for just 1 rupee. The ad concludes with a call to download the app to start learning.
